summary: Templated drift in internal/client/client.go: added Client.OnTokenExpired callback field and a 401-retry branch in do() that calls the callback to re-mint the bearer and retries the original request once. Wired by rootFlags.newClient() via makeTeslaAutoRefreshCallback.
reason: Tesla bearers expire after 8 hours; without auto-refresh, every long-running session hits 401 and forces a manual `auth refresh`. The right long-term home is a generator hook (deferred); for v1 the templated drift is contained: one struct field, one if-block in do(), one mutex-guarded closure in a new hand-coded file. TESLA_PP_NO_AUTOREFRESH=1 opts out.
validated_outcome: 6 client-side integration tests pass against an httptest server: retry on 401, no callback bubbles 401, refresh failure bubbles original 401, single-retry cap, 200 no-fire, 403 no-fire.
upstream_issue: Track generator hook in cli-printing-press; today regen-merge does not preserve client.go body drift, so every regen requires re-applying this patch.
